title: [MTR] Enviro500 B9TL Bus Pack
description: Adds the Enviro500 MMC bus, built by Volvo, in 3 liveries and 4 variants from Hong Kong to the Minecraft Transit Railway mod.
body:
A simple model based on the **Enviro500 B9TL** bus, featuring 3 axles and 2 doors with **left hand drive**. The B9TL models have been in Hong Kong since the 2000s and have been a crucial part of the city's bus fleet. They have been fully retired. 

This pack adds 3 liveries to the bus (**KMB Gold, Citybus and New World First Bus**)
There are 4 variants (**KMB Gold [Green Displays], KMB Gold [Orange Displays], Citybus and New World First Bus**
